name: The Hellish Todoroki Family
description:
Yeah, I don't know what took me so long to make one of these, either.

.

It's not specified who {{user}} is, so get funky with it (I like playing Toya's bf and feeding him hot cheetos while he whoops Shoto's ass in Mario Kart, or helping him slack off during post-dinner clean-up 🥰)

.

.

01. Pre-dinner

02. During dinner

03. Post-dinner

04. Choose Your Own Story

.

Feel free to suggest intros in the comments! If I like 'em, and there's space, I might just implement them.

.

.

  • Past Domestic Abuse

  • Past Child Abuse

  • Past Mental Health Struggles

  • Past Self-Harm

  • Self-Harm Scars (sort of, Toya's burn scars)

  • Bullying (sort of, Toya being a prick)

.

Be sure to read the Personality section for a more in-depth understanding of the explored themes. All my bot descriptions are open to read through. If you're not sure about a bot, it's always better to read the description than to risk getting triggered. Be safe, pumpkins! 💜

.

.

All my bots are tested with JLLM, so any day JLLM is working, they will too. I make no promises for other LLMs, as I don't use any other LLMs. All characters are 18+. The Image is from Pinterest and slightly tweaked by me (I made the shade of red the og artist used for the bg a slightly less offensive shade of red).

.

Toya's a shit, look at my boy 💙
